notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Keeps gift flow/claim fixes from CC7.5.8.
Keeps button completion logic from CC7.5.9: save requires button title and target link/command.
Button step 4 wording changed: no unclear word action; user sees where the button should lead and examples.
After user sends a link/command, the previous prompt menu is edited into review instead of sending a second menu when possible.
Stale button menus are deleted with extra retries.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
